title: Hollow Knight Gui -Zensiyoo
description: A Hollow Knight–inspired Minecraft GUI texture pack with dark, elegant, and immersive interface elements.
body:
This Hollow Knight GUI texture pack transforms Minecraft’s user interface to reflect the dark, atmospheric, and elegant style of Hollow Knight. Health bars, hunger bars, armor indicators, and other GUI elements are redesigned with intricate details, smooth lines, and a moody aesthetic while maintaining clarity and usability.

Perfect for adventure, exploration, or themed worlds, this pack gives Minecraft a more immersive and artistic feel without interfering with gameplay functionality. All elements are carefully crafted to balance style and readability, providing a polished and cohesive look inspired by the Hollow Knight universe.

Features

Complete Hollow Knight-inspired GUI redesign

Custom health, hunger, and armor bars

Stylish inventory and hotbar elements

Dark, atmospheric aesthetic for immersive gameplay

Maintains full readability and usability

Works with all vanilla gameplay mechanics

Perfect for adventure, exploration, and themed maps
